{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "Ibifoundry Limited is a business services and digital strategy firm.&nbsp;The company specializes in several key professional areas:&nbsp;Business Systems: Designing and implementing structured operational frameworks for organizations,&nbsp;Digital Strategy: Developing online growth and marketing plans to enhance brand presence,&nbsp;Enterprise-Level Growth: Providing expert guidance on scaling businesses and improving overall enterprise performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Answer phone calls and redirect them when necessary
	Manage the daily/weekly/monthly agenda and arrange new meetings and appointments
	Prepare and disseminate correspondence, memos and forms
	File and update contact information of employees, customers, suppliers and external partners
	Support and facilitate the completion of regular reports
	Develop and maintain a filing system
	Check frequently the levels of office supplies and place appropriate orders
	Make travel arrangements
	Document expenses and hand in reports
	Undertake occasional receptionist duties


Requirements and Skills


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor&#39;s Degree.
	Proven work experience as a Secretary or Administrative Assistant
	Familiarity with office organization and optimization techniques
	High degree of multi-tasking and time management capability
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Integrity and professionalism
	Proficiency in MS Office


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV &nbsp;to:&nbsp;ibifoundrylimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Secretary Job at Ibifoundry Limited




        
    

        
        Ibifoundry Limited is a business services and digital strategy firm. The company specializes in several key professional areas: Business Systems: Designing and implementing structured operational frameworks for organizations, Digital Strategy: Developing online growth and marketing plans to enhance brand presence, Enterprise-Level Growth: Providing expert guidance on scaling businesses and improving overall enterprise performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Answer phone calls and redirect them when necessary
	Manage the daily/weekly/monthly agenda and arrange new meetings and appointments
	Prepare and disseminate correspondence, memos and forms
	File and update contact information of employees, customers, suppliers and external partners
	Support and facilitate the completion of regular reports
	Develop and maintain a filing system
	Check frequently the levels of office supplies and place appropriate orders
	Make travel arrangements
	Document expenses and hand in reports
	Undertake occasional receptionist duties


Requirements and Skills


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, NCE, HND, or Bachelor's Degree.
	Proven work experience as a Secretary or Administrative Assistant
	Familiarity with office organization and optimization techniques
	High degree of multi-tasking and time management capability
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Integrity and professionalism
	Proficiency in MS Office


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV  to: ibifoundrylimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Representative",
  "description": "At Elvaridah Limited, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1,&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: Fully Onsite (Monday &ndash; Saturday)

Job Summary


	We are looking for a friendly, proactive, and customer-focused Sales Representative to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for assisting customers, driving sales, and ensuring a pleasant shopping experience both in-store and through online channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Guide customers through their gift-selection journey, both in-store and online.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and visually appealing store environment.
	Respond to and manage customer inquiries across multiple channels (in-person and social media).
	Support the team in achieving sales targets and business goals.
	Build and maintain positive relationships with customers to encourage repeat business.
	Assist with product display, restocking, and basic store operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience in sales, retail, or customer service.
	OND holders are eligible to apply.
	Graduates who have completed NYSC are also encouraged to apply.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced retail environment.
	Must be smart, proactive, and customer-oriented.
	Proximity to Lekki Phase 1 is highly important.


Benefits


	Salary: N100,000 - N120,000 / month.
	HMO (Health Insurance).
	End-of-Year Benefits.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;careers@elvaridah.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-08",

  },

Sales Representative Job at Elvaridah Limited




        
    

        
        At Elvaridah Limited, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: Fully Onsite (Monday – Saturday)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	We are looking for a friendly, proactive, and customer-focused Sales Representative to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for assisting customers, driving sales, and ensuring a pleasant shopping experience both in-store and through online channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Guide customers through their gift-selection journey, both in-store and online.
	Maintain a clean, organized, and visually appealing store environment.
	Respond to and manage customer inquiries across multiple channels (in-person and social media).
	Support the team in achieving sales targets and business goals.
	Build and maintain positive relationships with customers to encourage repeat business.
	Assist with product display, restocking, and basic store operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience in sales, retail, or customer service.
	OND holders are eligible to apply.
	Graduates who have completed NYSC are also encouraged to apply.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work in a fast-paced retail environment.
	Must be smart, proactive, and customer-oriented.
	Proximity to Lekki Phase 1 is highly important.


Benefits


	Salary: N100,000 - N120,000 / month.
	HMO (Health Insurance).
	End-of-Year Benefits.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@elvaridah.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Sales and Marketing Officer Job at Soteria Eye Clinic




        
    

        
        Soteria Eye Clinic is a private enterprise registered in Nigeria as a limited liability company to offer high quality, affordable and accessible comprehensive world class eye care services to our immediate community and environs. Our purpose is to create and deliver first class comprehensive eye care services to ALL in order to “Improve Lives through Affordable Quality Eye Care.”

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales and Marketing Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Qualifications
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 2 years of experience.
	Effective communication skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment20207@gmil.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Facility Manager",
  "description": "RP Facilities Limited is a leading facilities management company with nearly 15 years of experience delivering integrated facility management and specialized reverse osmosis water treatment solutions across commercial, healthcare, educational, and government sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki&nbsp; Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking an experienced and proactive Facility Manager to be the cornerstone of our organization. In this role, you will harmonize our facilities management strategy with daily operational processes, ensuring that our team is empowered and our operations are efficient, scalable, and aligned with organizational goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Facilities Management: Oversee the maintenance, security, and functionality of all facilities, ensuring a safe and efficient working environment.
	Operational Efficiency: Streamline workflows and coordinate activities across departments to enhance overall productivity and minimize waste.
	Policy &amp; Compliance: Develop and implement facility-related policies while ensuring strict adherence to local regulations and safety standards.
	Strategic Planning: Collaborate with leadership to forecast facility needs and translate business objectives into actionable operational plans.
	Resource Management: Manage vendor relationships, operational budgets, and facility resources to ensure cost-effectiveness and optimal performance.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 5&ndash;8 years of progressive experience in facilities management or operations, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role.


Required Skills:


	Leadership: Proven ability to lead and inspire teams.
	Tech-Savviness: Proficient in facility management software and technology.
	Analytical Thinking: Strong ability to analyze data and make informed decisions.
	Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Problem-Solving: Effective at identifying issues and implementing solutions.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief Cover Letter to:&nbsp;job.rpfacilities@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Facility Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Facility Manager Job at RP Facilities Limited




        
    

        
        RP Facilities Limited is a leading facilities management company with nearly 15 years of experience delivering integrated facility management and specialized reverse osmosis water treatment solutions across commercial, healthcare, educational, and government sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Manager

Job Location: Lekki  Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and proactive Facility Manager to be the cornerstone of our organization. In this role, you will harmonize our facilities management strategy with daily operational processes, ensuring that our team is empowered and our operations are efficient, scalable, and aligned with organizational goals.


Key Responsibilities


	Facilities Management: Oversee the maintenance, security, and functionality of all facilities, ensuring a safe and efficient working environment.
	Operational Efficiency: Streamline workflows and coordinate activities across departments to enhance overall productivity and minimize waste.
	Policy & Compliance: Develop and implement facility-related policies while ensuring strict adherence to local regulations and safety standards.
	Strategic Planning: Collaborate with leadership to forecast facility needs and translate business objectives into actionable operational plans.
	Resource Management: Manage vendor relationships, operational budgets, and facility resources to ensure cost-effectiveness and optimal performance.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 5–8 years of progressive experience in facilities management or operations, with at least 5 years in a supervisory role.


Required Skills:


	Leadership: Proven ability to lead and inspire teams.
	Tech-Savviness: Proficient in facility management software and technology.
	Analytical Thinking: Strong ability to analyze data and make informed decisions.
	Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Problem-Solving: Effective at identifying issues and implementing solutions.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a brief Cover Letter to: job.rpfacilities@gmail.com using "Facility Manager" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Fortics Lifecare is to be a leading healthcare holding company in Africa, developing existing healthcare assets into world-class health facilities across the continent integrating quality service delivery to clients and financial prosperity for our sake, to inspire and promote hope, health and total wellbeing by providing the best care for every patient through integrated clinical practice, continuos education and research, delivering this service at cost-effective prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Care Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced CHEW in Nursing who is interested in the position of Client Care Representative (front desk) to join our team at our healthcare facility in Lekki Phase 1.


Responsibilities


	Provide exceptional customer service to our clients
	Respond to client inquiries and concerns in a timely and professional manner
	Resolve client complaints and issues promptly
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure a seamless client experience
	Very open and Friendly with a client (patients).


Requirements


	1-2 years of working experience in customer service or client care
	A qualified SSCE / OND / NCE/&nbsp;holder certification
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and prioritize tasks effectively
	Proficiency in EMR portal, Microsoft Office, and other software applications
	Residency within Ikate, Igboefon, and its environs is mandatory.


Salary
N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Staff-success@fortics.org&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Client Care Representative Job at Fortics Lifecare Limited




        
    

        
        Fortics Lifecare is to be a leading healthcare holding company in Africa, developing existing healthcare assets into world-class health facilities across the continent integrating quality service delivery to clients and financial prosperity for our sake, to inspire and promote hope, health and total wellbeing by providing the best care for every patient through integrated clinical practice, continuos education and research, delivering this service at cost-effective prices.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Care Representative

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced CHEW in Nursing who is interested in the position of Client Care Representative (front desk) to join our team at our healthcare facility in Lekki Phase 1.


Responsibilities


	Provide exceptional customer service to our clients
	Respond to client inquiries and concerns in a timely and professional manner
	Resolve client complaints and issues promptly
	Maintain accurate records of client interactions
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure a seamless client experience
	Very open and Friendly with a client (patients).


Requirements


	1-2 years of working experience in customer service or client care
	A qualified SSCE / OND / NCE/ holder certification
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and prioritize tasks effectively
	Proficiency in EMR portal, Microsoft Office, and other software applications
	Residency within Ikate, Igboefon, and its environs is mandatory.


Salary
N120,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: Staff-success@fortics.org using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
